title: Open Ecocuration
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"13mqr","text":"Open Ecocuratorship is an open source method for data curation, content curation, and other curatorial practices in compliance with international standards of sustainable development (SD), environmental social governance (ESG), library information science (LIS), and ecomuseology.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"48pbc","text":"Follow each step in compliance with public international law (PIL) rule of law (RoL).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

"}},"8":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"9E538B8CECD311F0A7AC0A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://commission.europa.eu/about/departments-and-executive-agencies/digital-services/open-source-strategy-history/european-union-public-licence_en"}},"9":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"9E538BDFECD311F0A7AC0A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://interoperable-europe.ec.europa.eu/collection/eupl/how-use-eupl"}}}}
steps: Open science methodology rule of law (RoL) regulatory compliance. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rule_of_law https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Regulatory_compliance https://academia.edu/130285447/Rule_of_Law_Open_Science_RoLOS_ Rule of Law Open Science (RoLOS) by Felipe Ribeiro Consider using my own 'Open Ecocuratorship' method. https://academia.edu/145860429/Open_Ecocuratorship

Open license and ethical license decision. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open_license https://ethicalsource.dev Consider using my 'Nonviolent Nonprofit Open Education License (NNOEL)'. Nonviolent Nonprofit Open Education License (NNOEL) by Felipe Ribeiro

Library information science (LIS) information management . https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Library_and_information_science https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Information_management Standardize your archives file types, file names, and file structures. Consider using my 'Open Archive' methodology. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Archives_management Open Archive by Felipe Ribeiro Records management collections management . https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Records_management https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Collections_management
Open publishing open journalism open peer review . https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open_publishing https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open_source_journalism https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open_peer_review

• Big history universal history encyclopedism . • Reproducible open research . • Meta research recursive heuristics . • Open historiography archival research . • Philosophy semiotic communicology sociolinguistic linguistic literary studies . • Source literature source texts historical documents and historical sources criticism . • Primary source hermeneutics . • Secondary sources and tertiary sources exegesis . • C anonical canon semantic analysis . • Collaborative filtering .

Open ecomuseology like micromuseology open economy ontology (OEO) fundraising . https://academia.edu/130298294/Open_Ecomuseology https://academia.edu/144420714/Micromuseology https://academia.edu/144330629/Open_Economy_Ontology_OEO_ Micromuseum by Felipe Ribeiro This will obviously require a sustainable open licitation open procurement plan.
Project reliability organization (PRO) project management project design . Collection cu ratorship curatorial practice content curation .

Sustainable development goals (SDGs) biosustainable ecodevelopment compliance plan. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sustainable_Development_Goals https://academia.edu/145532129/Biosustainable_Ecodevelopment

Environmental social governance (ESG) constitutional open governance . https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Environmental,_social,_and_governance https://academia.edu/130284613/Constitutional_Open_Governance_COG_
Green logistics strategy development. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Green_logistics Consider using the LogCluster guides . https://logcluster.org/en/green-logistics

Do not forget to comply with the laws on bioprospecting , fair trade , and cultural appropriation . https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bioprospecting https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fair_trade https://localcontexts.org/labels/traditional-knowledge-labels
creator: Felipe Ribeiro
